340 J0500B_PAIN_EFCT_ACTVTY_CD J0500B_PAIN_EFCT_ACTVTY_CD J0500B Pain Assessment Interview: Pain Effect Activity Code CHAR 1 The data in this column indicates whether the resident's day-to-day activities were limited because of pain or hurting in the last five days. -=Not assessed/no information
